LanguageData.Centurion_Arsenal_Codex_Hediff.label: Centurion Arsenal Codex: Composite Tactical Backmount
LanguageData.Centurion_Arsenal_Codex_Hediff.descripti: You now have everything, go for it.
LanguageData.CrimsonSlagburstScorched.label: Crimson Slagburst Scorched
LanguageData.GD_Hediff_CloakedEffect.label: Optical Camouflage Active
LanguageData.Moonlight_Synchronization.label: Moonlight Coherence Synchronization
LanguageData.Moonlight_Synchronization.description: Stimulated by moonlight radiation, the implanted photon crystal beam iris and neural spectral guidance membrane resonate, putting the host into an overload state with significantly enhanced combat perception and reaction speed
LanguageData.NCL_Overwatch_Nexus_MechBoost.label: Tactical Data Link Synchronization
LanguageData.NCL_Overwatch_Nexus_MechBoost.descriptio: Through tactical networks built by anti-stealth radar, real-time optimization of mechanoid fire control systems significantly improves shooting accuracy and battlefield response speed
LanguageData.NCL_Shadow_Tag_Hediff.label: Shadow Tag
LanguageData.NCL_Shadow_Tag_Hediff.description: Target has been shadow tagged and cannot move for a short time
LanguageData.NCL_ShoulderTurretActive.label: Extended Shoulder Turret
LanguageData.NCL_ShoulderTurretActive.comps.HediffCom: A low caliber autonomous gun made to be mounted on a shoulder
LanguageData.NCL_Solar_Disruption.label: Solar Decoherence
LanguageData.NCL_Solar_Disruption.description: "Like the moon falling into the sea." Inevitable aftereffect following termination of the "Final Gaze" protocol, resulting from quantum entanglement structure rupture between photon crystal beams and neural guidance membranes, causing host's entire sensory and motor systems to enter decoherence collapse phase. Although consciousness remains, body and mind are severely dysregulated
LanguageData.NCL_Terminus_Gazed_Hediff.label: Terminus Gaze
LanguageData.NCL_Terminus_Gazed_Hediff.description: Final combat protocol in NCL "Moonlight Child" project, restricted to LUN-EYE-07α grade iris carriers. When activated, the implantee enters a near-divine combat state: time seems to freeze, enemies unaware, destruction arrives. But the cost is unavoidable - after protocol ends, host suffers complete neural collapse, falling into sensory paralysis and combat capability loss
LanguageData.Symbiomesh.label: Symbiotic Membrane: Dynamic Physiological Regulation
LanguageData.Symbiomesh.description: Nano-fluids actively regulate physiological state, enhancing physical efficiency and operational adaptability
LanguageData.The_coming_death.label: Death Approaches
LanguageData.TW_WasEncouraged.label: Encouraged
LanguageData.Zero_Point_Overdrive_Hediff.label: Zero-Point Flash Overdrive
LanguageData.Zero_Point_Overdrive_Hediff.description: Mechanical joints enter overdrive mode, movement speed increased, damage taken halved, shooting cooldown halved
